title: Hugging Face suffers a data breach orchestrated by an autonomous AI agent
summary: The attack compromised internal datasets and credentials, and the company used AI to counter the threat.

title: Microsoft expands its alliance with AMD to incorporate its Helios AI accelerators into Azure
summary: The collaboration includes the deployment of AMD Instinct MI455X GPUs and Epyc Venice processors in Microsoft's cloud, reducing dependence on NVIDIA.

title: Samsung launches 1600-nit tandem OLED panels for laptops with DisplayHDR True Black 1400 certification
summary: The new panels, supplied to Lenovo, Asus, Dell, and MSI, set a new brightness record for laptops.

title: Chinese AI model Kimi K3 arouses admiration from Musk and threat of ban in US
summary: The Trump administration is considering blocking Chinese AI models after the launch of Kimi K3, while Elon Musk praises its performance.

title: A modder creates a portable PS4 with a 7-inch OLED screen and removable battery
summary: The customized console includes HDMI, GPU fan, and a more compact design for portable gaming.

title: Google develops the 'Frozen v2' chip to run Gemini more efficiently
summary: The new silicon integrates Gemini's architecture directly into hardware to improve performance and reduce consumption.
